creator: miguelmclara@gmail.com
text:
I've update xdg-utils and just noticed I lost my changes.

Is there any special reason this was never done?

Is the patch wrong? or is this supposed to be done elsewhere?


Lumina as become my default DE this days... It fits perfect with a FreeBSD desktop IMHO, is simple light and its adding a few nice features...

Anyway at the end of the day its about preference but still It would be nice to have this fix in xdg-open.

Thanks
